'''âw-h-l-l''' ('''kawahleloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:final|final]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-l-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:final|final]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-h-l-l
|-
! Lemma
| kawahleloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwahleloko|thiwahleloko]] || [[word:jiwahleloko|jiwahleloko]] || [[word:shiwahleloko|shiwahleloko]] || [[word:kiwahleloko|kiwahleloko]]
|-
